metadata.description: Resource group containing ACR, Key Vault, and Cognitive Services (e.g. bhs-development-public)
Existing Azure Speech account name (in existingServicesResourceGroup)
Existing Azure AI Services account name (in existingServicesResourceGroup)
Resource group containing the existing PostgreSQL Flexible Server
Azure AD tenant ID for Entra authentication
Azure AD Client ID (frontend MSAL app registration)
Azure AD API Client ID (backend app registration)
DAM container image (full reference including tag)
Tag for bhs-web and bhs-api images
Unique suffix for globally unique name
VNet ID for DNS zone link
WAF policy mode. Use Detection for dev/staging, Prevention for prod.
Application Gateway resource ID (created externally so AGIC add-on can reference it)
Log Analytics Workspace ID for monitoring
AKS cluster system-assigned principal ID (for network contributor)
AGIC managed identity principal ID (for App Gateway configuration)
AKS storage account resource ID (in bhs-aks RG, created by aks-storage module)
App Gateway resource ID (in bhs-aks RG, created by aks-appgateway module)

properties.description: Allow AKS cluster to manage VNet
Allow api workload to read/write blobs in AKS storage account
Allow api workload to read/write tables in AKS storage account (Durable Functions)
Allow api workload to read/write queues in AKS storage account (Durable Functions)
Allow AGIC to read resource group resources
Allow AGIC to configure App Gateway routing rules
Allow AGIC to manage VNet subnets (required for subnet join action)

metadata.description: AKS kubelet (node pool) managed identity principal ID
API Workload Identity UAMI principal ID (from aks-rbac module output)
Name of the existing ACR in this resource group
Name of the existing Key Vault in this resource group
Name of the Azure Speech Cognitive Services account in this resource group
Name of the AI Services / Azure OpenAI account in this resource group
App Gateway managed identity principal ID (needs Key Vault Secrets User to pull TLS cert)

properties.description: Allow AKS node pool kubelet to pull images from ACR
Allow api workload to read Key Vault secrets (CSI driver)
Allow api workload to call Azure Speech service
Allow api workload to call Azure AI Services (DocIntel, Speech)
Allow api workload to call Azure OpenAI service
Allow App Gateway to pull TLS certificate from Key Vault

metadata.description: Resource ID of the existing Key Vault
Private endpoint subnet ID (in AKS VNet)
AKS VNet ID for DNS zone link
Resource ID of the existing PostgreSQL Flexible Server
Private endpoint subnet ID (in AKS VNet)
AKS VNet ID for DNS zone link
AKS OIDC issuer URL (used for Workload Identity federated credential)
API workload UAMI client ID (set as azure.workload.identity/client-id annotation on ServiceAccount)
Subscription tenant ID — used by CSI driver to authenticate to Key Vault
Application Gateway resource name (used by Deploy-AKS.ps1 to attach TLS certificate)
Name of the TLS certificate as registered on the App Gateway (referenced by AGIC Ingress ssl-certificate annotation)
